title: Tooltip Attribute Icons
description: Adds Icons to Attribute Tooltips, like Attack Damage & Armor! With Mod Support!
body:
# Archived
Use [Attribute Icons (RPG Series)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/attribute-icons-rpg-series) instead
# Tooltip Attribute Icons
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6a1d7beab3a976eed76145190bb694be09237845_0.webp)

A simple resourcepack that adds many new icons to various attributes!

## Mod Support!
In addition to the vanilla game this resource pack provides support for the following mods:

**RPG Series**
- [Wizards (RPG Series)](https://modrinth.com/mod/wizards)
- [Paladins & Priests (RPG Series)](https://modrinth.com/mod/paladins-and-priests)
- [Archers (RPG Series)](https://modrinth.com/mod/archers)
- [Rogues & Warriors (RPG Series)](https://modrinth.com/mod/rogues-and-warriors)
- [Jewelry (RPG Series)](https://modrinth.com/mod/jewelry)
- [Death Knights (RPG Series)](https://modrinth.com/mod/death-knights)

**Attribute API**
- [Spell Power Attributes](https://modrinth.com/mod/spell-power)
- [Ranged Weapon API](https://modrinth.com/mod/ranged-weapon-api)

If you would like to see more mod support leave a suggestion in the [Discord](https://discord.gg/X6TAsTz8NQ)!
## Credits
Some icons a based on scaled down versions of [Daedelus](https://modrinth.com/user/ZsoltMolnarrr)' icons.
